title: tribolium pusillum
intro: Tribolium pusillum, also known as the wheat seed bug or lesser grain borer, is not a plant but an insect that belongs to the family Tenebrionidae. However, I found that Tribolium is the genus name for several beetles, and one species of Tribolium is Tribolium castaneum, not Tribolium pusillum. Tribolium castaneum is a species of beetle that is known for its association with stored grain.
